About.title: About me
About.description: My name is Alfayad S. I am a full stack developer focused on building modern web applications—from responsive frontends to scalable backends and APIs. I work with React, Next.js, Node.js, and databases to deliver clean, maintainable solutions for students, startups, and businesses. Whether you need a portfolio site, e-commerce platform, or a custom app, I help bring ideas to life with clear structure and quality code.

WelcomeModal.title: Create an account for exclusive coupon offers
WelcomeModal.description: Sign up or log in to get access to coupon codes and special discounts on our development services. Create your account to apply coupons at checkout and save on your project.
